sections.paragraph: adj. only used in f. כֵּהָה failing, weak, specially of a wick burning with a very little flame, almost gone out, Isa 42:3 of eyes become dim, 1Sa 3:2 of a faint light colour, Levit. 13:39 “spots כֵּהֹות לְבָנֹור of a pale whiteness,” von mattweißer Farbe; of a spirit broken down, Isa 61:3.
